title: calocephalus priceanus
intro: Calocephalus priceanus, also known as the Silver Bush or Silver Daisy, is a flowering plant native to Western Australia, characterized by its silvery-gray foliage and yellow daisy-like flowers. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its potential anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which may help to treat various health issues, including skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Calocephalus priceanus are believed to include reduced inflammation, improved wound healing, and relief from skin conditions such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and stems are often used in infusions, tinctures, or salves, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for medicinal use.
